# Agent Guide — TypeScript detector (`@repo-fingerprint/core`)

## Run
```bash
cd packages/ts && npm ci && npm run build
node dist/cli.js <path> [--format json|text] [--deep]
```
Exit codes: `0` detected, `1` none, `2` usage error. Env overrides: `RF_MATRIX`, `RF_SCHEMA`.

## Import surface
```ts
import { fingerprint, validateReport, canonicalize } from "@repo-fingerprint/core";
import type { DetectionReport } from "@repo-fingerprint/core";

const report: DetectionReport = fingerprint("/path/to/repo");   // full pipeline
const { valid, errors } = validateReport(report);               // ajv against the shared schema
```
Also exported: confidence primitives (`rawScoreOf`, `confidenceOf`, `bucketOf`, `proximateScore`,
`decayedWeight`, `round4`) and `loadMatrix`.

## Layout (`src/`)
`walker` → `signals` (glob match + depth) → `parsers` (package.json / pyproject / pom / go.mod /
Cargo via `@iarna/toml` + `fast-xml-parser`) → `frameworks` → `topology` / `infra` → `confidence`
→ `report` (aggregate + assemble) → `fingerprint` (orchestrator) → `cli`. `schema.ts` validates,
`canonical.ts` normalizes for golden/parity comparison.

## Tests / checks
```bash
npm run typecheck   # tsc --noEmit
npm run build       # emits dist/
npm test            # node:test — confidence, parsers, schema, goldens (22 tests)
```
The reference detector: `scripts/gen-goldens.mjs` generates every fixture golden from this impl.
